description_long: This is a black slip-on clog-style shoe, reminiscent of Crocs, featuring a thick, contoured sole and a rounded toe. The upper surface is adorned with several metallic spikes, giving it a punk or alternative fashion aesthetic. Ventilation holes are present on the top and sides, providing breathability. A pivoting heel strap, decorated with a row of small metallic studs, allows for a secure fit or can be rotated forward for a slip-on style. The shoe appears to be made primarily of molded rubber or EVA foam, with the spikes and studs likely made of metal or hard plastic. The overall design is bold and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where both comfort and statement style are desired.
description: A black clog-style shoe with metallic spikes and a studded heel strap, featuring ventilation holes and a thick, contoured sole. The design is bold and utilitarian, blending comfort with a punk-inspired aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, central ventilation holes, and prominent metallic spikes on the upper surface.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the thick sole, side ventilation holes, and the studded pivoting heel strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open heel area and the back of the heel strap, with the sole's thickness clearly visible.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the side ventilation holes, spikes, and the studded strap.
